specific_question: How many customers attended Elexion Automotive's virtual Q&A sessions in Q2 2024?
answer: According to an internal report completed by Elexion Automotive's sales and marketing department, 2456 customers participated in virtual Q&A sessions where they could ask questions directly to product specialists and quality engineers.
dr_question: How could Elexion Automotive utilize Automotive Cloud's dealer performance management tools by early 2027 to strengthen relationships with its North American dealer network and, at the same time, maintain 90% of its direct-to-government sales channel?
